As<TOther>()

Creates an immutable array for this array, cast to a different element type.

public FastImmutableArray<TOther> As<TOther>() where TOther : class

Returns

FastImmutableArray<TOther>

A struct typed for the base element type. If the cast fails, an instance is returned whose property returns true.

Type Parameters

TOther

The type of array element to return.

Remarks

Arrays of derived elements types can be cast to arrays of base element types without reallocating the array. These upcasts can be reversed via this same method, casting an array of base element types to their derived types. However, down casting is only successful when it reverses a prior upcasting operation.
